title: Rwanda – Country Overview
content: Rwanda is a landlocked country in East Africa known as the Land of a Thousand Hills. It has demonstrated resilience, strong governance, and cultural continuity.

title: Kingdom of Rwanda
content: The Kingdom of Rwanda was a centralized pre-colonial state ruled by a Mwami and supported by cultural and political institutions.

title: Family Lineage in Rwanda
content: Family lineage has historically shaped social identity, inheritance, and community responsibilities within Rwandan society.
